entry.title: Re: how to do the background scheduling in Public Cloud 2408
entry.content:
Hello @praneshti23 

 

The app Application Jobs is used for background scheduling .

 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/37e7a011a524405882af49cce79f0fb4.html?version=2402.502

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Header level Aggregated value ZPR1, needs to automati...
entry.content:
Hi Abul,

In you pricing procedure, in the step where you have ZPMO, put in the FROM cell the value of the step where ZPR1 is determined. 

Please see the below standard example for reference. In this case, condition type DRG1 uses the value from step 100 (Gross Value) and it applies against it the percentage entered.

Regards,

-Carlos

entry.title: Re: How to do TERMINATED USers from SF in IAS uisng IPS User sync

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
@YatenderSharma it is great to meet you. The catalog is live Session Catalog - SAP TechEd 2024 with speakers. As another thought you may look at upcoming SAP TechEd on Tour stops which are in collaboration with the SAP User Groups. For example - DSAG should have a call for speakers once planning is underway. There are 4 stops as described in the SAP TechEd in 2024 | SAP Events.

You may consider leading and/or participating in a SAP Community Inside Track. This may be a good opportunity for you to speak. SAP Inside Track | SAP Community

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Modelo de Autorización con Condiciones basadas en con...
entry.content:
Hola buen dia comidad, tengo una duda sobre un requermiento.

en el modulo de venta ->factura a deudores, necesito una autorizacion que cuando el usaurio quiera camabiar el precio del articulo me pida la autorizacion de un usaurio con permisos mayore. he estado investigando sobre el asunto ya que en el modulo de autorizaciones no hay autorizacion que me permita dicho requerimiento,  estoy investigando los modelos de autorizaciones basados en Querys pero aun no tengo nada  concreto.

De antemano gracias.

pendiente  a sus respuestas.

entry.title: Re: Formating SO10 in Adobe with SmartStyle.
entry.content: This does not work. I created a style ZCM_BOLD and added character format for bold characters. I only want certain characters from the SO10 text to be bold but when I apply the above properties the entire thing is bold. If I try to use the character format BD that I created in the text via <BD></> it just displays the <BD></> and doesn't apply the character format just to the words I want it to. This should not be that complicated and it's frustrating that SAP requires jumping through this many hoops just to get a simple formatting thing to work!!!!

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Here's My Solution.

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
My solution:

 

 

 

CLASS zms_cl_travel_copy DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zms_cl_travel_copy IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    DATA: lt_travel TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zms_db_travel.

    SELECT client, travel_id, description, total_price, currency_code,
    CASE
      WHEN status = 'N' THEN 'O'
      WHEN status = 'P' THEN 'O'
      WHEN status = 'B' THEN 'A'
      ELSE 'X'
      END AS status
    FROM /dmo/travel
    INTO TABLE _travel.
    IF lt_travel IS NOT INITIAL.
      "Refresh the existing data if any.
      DELETE zms_db_travel FROM TABLE _travel.
      "Populate the new data.
      INSERT zms_db_travel FROM TABLE _travel.
      IF sy-subrc IS INITIAL.
        DATA(lv_message) = |'Data inserted successfully!'- { sy-dbcnt }|.
        out->write( lv_message ).
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: SO10 Text to print on adobe using SE72?
entry.content: Doing this makes the entire text bold. What if I only want a few words of the text in bold. Nothing I have tried is working. Tried creating character format inside of style for bold characters using "BA" and even if I include <BA></> in the text it still makes the entire thing bold and displays the hypertext params.

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hello Pierre,

Thanks so much for responding.

Yes -- when i hit the http://localhost:4200/electronics-spa/en/USD ( i believe it is http and not https)

I see that ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR on the browser side. It most likely seems like CORS kind of an error. I have tried to follow exactly the steps mentioned above. I can't seem to figure out what seems to be the problem or if any one else has bumped into issue like this before?

The following error is what i see from the console.

An unknown http error occurred Http failure response for https://localhost:9002/occ/v2/basesites?fields=FULL: 0 undefined

As i said before I can hit the OCC end point from swagger.  So i was hoping to get any suggestions as to what else I can try to get this fixed. 

-thanks,

Kiran

Hi Vivek,

It is not possible to define New Condition Contract types, only limited changes can be made to the existing ones. See below.

-Carlos

entry.title: Re: HANA Express Edition-SAP Control Request failed
entry.content:
On your laptop, check that you can successfully ping to the machine running SAP HANA express.  For example, ping hxehost. 

If it is a Windows machine, you can update your hosts file.
127.0.0.1 localhost hxehost

The following might be used to verify that the database is started and reachable.
Switch to the hxeadm user
sudo su hxeadm

Attempt to connect to the server using hdbsql which should be located at /usr/sap/HXE/HDB90/exe/hdbsql

hdbsql -n hxehost:39013 -u SYSTEM -p YourHanaPWD1234


If that is successful, you can query to see the details of the port used by the SQL Port used by the tenant database using:
SELECT * FROM SYS_DATABASES.M_SERVICES WHERE SQL_PORT != 0;

entry.title: Re: Can Story custom date filter be controlled by scripts?
entry.content: I'm not sure exactly why your proposed solution won't work for PM8, but it won't work for me because your solution uses a standard input control. What I think PM8 is looking for (me as well) is a solution that uses the Current Date Input Control that gets created using a date selection in a Restricted Measure. Typically I use these to specify a date (fiscal year for example) in 1 column, and then provide an offset in subsequent columns. I have not found a solution for this scenario.

entry.title: Re: SAP provided official document type list
entry.content:
I found this link and I hope it will help you.

Default Settings for Users | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi @kmanur,

I have not seen this issue before. I suggest you try accessing the site using https instead of http. If that doesn't help, then I suggest making sure the cors-related properties you copied to your gradle file correctly appear in your config/local.properties file. Unfortunately, apart from those two suggestions, I can't think of anything else.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: My result:

entry.title: Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Expense
entry.content:
SAP Concur is imagining a world where travel and expenses practically manage themselves, helping businesses run at their best every day. Data Delivery Service lets you combine SAP Concur data with data from your company’s existing financial systems to see all expense data in one place. Bring data directly into your own BI tools. 

  • Control spending before it hits your budget 
  • Create, adjust, and enforce spending policies 
  • Reimburse employees more quickly 
  • Negotiate with vendors to cut costs 

In today’s data driven, analytical business environment, companies need insights that give stakeholders realizable value. To ensure our customers have the most efficient data integration, we have created an efficient, optimized, and strategic Concur Data Templates for Data Delivery Service Expense solution. We’ve created a dataflow already formatted to Concur Expense specific entries and headers so you can analyze your data and discover insights, focusing on what matters most.​ Discover new insights, trends, and predictions through powerful analytics based on cross data models. Data Templates for Concur Data Delivery Service (Expense) includes numerous topics related to the Expense module of SAP Concur namely, Expense Administration, Credit Card Program Management, Policy Compliance, Risk and Compliance, System Overview and the Standard stories that were previously available using the standard connector to integrate the two tools. ​

  • Accurate, Timely Reports Take the risk out of outdated reporting and be certain you’re getting the right data right when you need it, so you can count on the story it’s telling.​
  • Corporate Cards vs. Cash Watch for cash spending in categories where corporate cards give you better visibility, control, and negotiating power – such as airfare, hotels, and car rentals. ​
  • Policy Compliance Solve multiple use cases by combining some of the most requested expense policy exception metrics in one highly functional dashboard containing multiple interactive visualizations that can be dynamically filtered to answer key questions.​

By partnering with Datasphere customers have direct access to analytical data sets and analysis models; multi-dimensional modeling with powerful analytical capabilities and built-in data preview​, a graphical impact and lineage analysis to visualize data movements, transformations, and other dependencies. By consolidating plan and actual data within SAP Datasphere, organizations can foster a single source of truth, minimizing discrepancies and ensuring data integrity​. The new data templates for SAP Analytics Cloud will make it easy for SAP customers to ingest SAP Concur data to SAP Datasphere and analyze the data using templates available in SAP Analytics Cloud. This content package comprises six comprehensive reporting stories, each built from analytical models delivered through a live data connection from SAP Datasphere. 

  • SAP Travel & Expense: Expense Administration This story offers a comprehensive analysis of expenditure, outstanding spend, and workflow efficiency. By integrating and visualizing spending data alongside outstanding balances, it provides insights into financial transactions and workflow performance. 
  • SAP Travel & Expense: Credit Card Program Management Designed to streamline and oversee credit card programs, this story integrates and visualizes card usage data, providing a holistic view of cardholder activity and program efficiency. Additionally, it offers detailed insights into credit card transactions, highlighting spending patterns, transaction volumes, and potential anomalies, thereby enhancing financial oversight and fraud detection. 
  • SAP Travel & Expense: Policy Compliance This story focuses on identifying and managing expense exceptions to ensure policy compliance. Through visualizations and insights, it enables proactive identification and resolution of policy violations, enhancing financial governance and compliance measures. 
  • SAP Travel & Expense: Risk and Compliance This story provides a comprehensive overview of risk and compliance factors, including potential duplicate expenses, duplicate attendees, and credit card late fees. By analyzing expense and transaction data, it identifies potential risks and compliance issues, such as duplicate entries and late payment penalties. 
  • SAP Travel & Expense: System Management This story offers a comprehensive view of system management aspects, encompassing active user statistics, user distribution insights, and detailed employee profiles. By visualizing system usage and user demographics, it provides administrators with valuable insights into system performance and user engagement. 
  • SAP Travel & Expense: Spend Overview This story is the bridge from our previous solution with the standard connector to the new one. It covers key topics like expenses, entries per reports, reports, and Process Runtime. Designed for easy access and familiarity, it ensures you find the same data effortlessly, making your transition smooth and efficient. 

Product Content URLs

  • Content Package Announcement
  • SAP Concur Expense DDS Integration with SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Datasphere Business Content
  • SAP Analytics Cloud Content

To learn more, reach-out to your Concur account executive. Data and Analytics SAP Concur

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hello,

Here is my second week submission.

entry.title: Re: I am unable post deferred tax transfer documents in T...
entry.content:
Hi Svanka2,

This process can fail because of multiple reasons. So you will need to check the following settings in your system and process to see if one of these apply to you.

Failure because of Tax GL account setting:

  1. Deferred tax accounts should be set up as open item management account. The SAP standard program creates a post with transfer entry which clears the items in the deferred tax account and enter the amount with a true tax into the target account.
  2. SAP also mentions in OSS note 1859099 that if the deferred accounts which will  include amount <0 then "tax category field in the GL master" should be "*" . If the accounts will have only amounts which are > 0 then "tax category" field should be created as "< - input tax"
  3. Target account (the tax receiving account) was created as open item. True tax accounts should never be created as open items. Make sure this is not the case.

When you executed the deferred program you can do it in 2 ways.

  1. Create a batch input session. With this option you can then run the batch input session in foreground and there you can exactly see what is causing the error. Here there could be multiple reasons some can be. No profit center assign to the transaction, A field for the posting was not set as "optional" and is needed for the transaction. here you will need to find out which is the cause.
  2. If you run it with direct input, then the error should be in the logs. If the logs are not descriptive enough I suggest you run it using the batch input option and see what is the error.

I hope this helps you.

happy hunting.

entry.title: Re: MDK: Problem accessing the value of a field
entry.content:
Assuming the default binding points to the record for reference you would just directly access the binding for the Activo property using:

let activo = clientAPI.binding.Activo;

entry.title: Re: HOW TO COPY OLD P.O TO CREATE NEW P.O ?
entry.content: 1-Run Tcode-ME21N 2-Select the Doc. Type 3-Click on document overview ON 4-from Document Overview Click on Purchase Order 5-A new screen will come where you put the required PO no from which you want to copy. 6-Now the PO no with Line item will copy on document overview screen 7-Select the appropriate Line item of that Po and then click on "Adopt" or if you want to copy all the line items of that particular Po then just select the Po no and then click on Adopt. 8-Now it will copy all the contents of the Copied PO into the new PO as per adoption.

entry.title: SAP Configuration to Limit the Conversion of Planned Orders into Production by Quantity
entry.content:
Estou tendo problemas para limitar a conversão da ordem de produção usando uma ordem planejada. Existe uma configuração padrão para essa limitação?

Exemplo: há uma ordem planejada para 1.000 peças. A ideia é que a conversão da ordem de produção seja limitada a 1.000 peças ou, no máximo, limite um percentual excedente. Se a limitação for definida como 5%, a ordem de produção poderá ter no máximo 1.050 peças.

Onde posso configurar essa funcionalidade sem precisar personalizá-la?

entry.title: Re: MDK: Problem accessing the value of a field
entry.content: Hi bill ! Thanks for your help. I think I have another problem with this property... This property was added after creating the MDK application. When I add it, BAS does not show me the property. So I went to the "Services" > Auditoria.service" folder and selected the "Sync Service" option and "Activo" started to appear among the available options. But now I am working on editing the entity, and when I want to save the changes the error I am receiving is the following: "Error: "com.sap.cloud.mobile.o.data.core.UndefinitedException: Property 'Activo' not found in entity type 'InfraestructuraService.Auditoria'". I don't know why it tells me this, look at the file's metadata and it appears defined. Do I need to do some other type of update?

entry.title: Re: Simulation start and end pages do not appear on Compa...
entry.content:
Hi Sanchia,

Have you published the actual Start and End Book Pages as well as the Simulation?  The Start and End Pages are separate content objects so must be published along with the Simulation.

If you have published the Book Pages, if you scroll back to the beginning of the Simulation, is the Start Page visible?  I can see from the image you included in the post that you are part way through the Simulation, not at the beginning so I'm not sure what you see if you return to the beginning of the Simulation.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to export data as excel but with subto...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out. Unfortunately, at this time, we do not have the requested option available. We are working to enhance our services and hope to offer this option in the near future.

We appreciate your understanding and are here to assist with any other questions or needs you may have.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: OData service limitations
entry.content:
There are limitations.  
SAC and datasphere leverage same cloud analytical engine for query execution plan.
SAC is deeply integrated with SAP Datasphere and can leverage advanced features such as storyboards, smart insights, and predictive analytics that are natively supported.
Other tools like Power BI or ServiceNow may not fully support these advanced capabilities. The analytical model may lose certain functionalities or optimizations when accessed through an OData service.

Some complex calculated measures or restricted key figures that work seamlessly in SAC might not be fully supported or behave differently in other tools due to varying support for advanced calculation logic in these tools.

OData services can expose large datasets, but the performance can vary depending on the external tool’s ability to handle and optimize queries. SAC is optimized for querying and rendering data from SAP Datasphere. Other tools might face performance bottlenecks, especially with large datasets or complex queries.

SSO and row level security could also be a challenges when connected to their party front end tools.

entry.title: Debug ACR Report
entry.content: My ACR report is not returning any data and I want to debug to understand the issue, but SRF_REPORTING_TAST OData service is not getting triggered. Tried the change set methods and create entity and update entity methods. Any suggestion?

entry.title: Re: OData service limitations
entry.content: thanks a lot for the above valuable points

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere OData service
entry.content:
In SAP Datasphere, create and publish an analytical model as an OData service to generate an OData service URL.

In ServiceNow, create a new REST message that points to the OData service URL you obtained from SAP Datasphere. This REST message will define how ServiceNow interacts with the OData service, including the HTTP methods (GET, POST, etc.) and parameters used.
Map the retrieved data to ServiceNow fields and use it in workflows or reports.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere OData service
entry.content: Thank you so much. I will try it.

entry.title: Re: Change length of column in table in SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: Re: How to query for last Bin Location that received Items?
entry.content: I managed to get the information that i need

entry.title: Re: How to query for last Bin Location that received Items?
entry.content: SELECT T5.[DocNum], T5.[CardName], T4.[ItemCode], T4.[Dscription], T4.[VendorNum], T4.[Quantity], T3.[BinCode] FROM OILM T0 INNER JOIN (SELECT ItemCode, Max(MessageID) AS "MaxMess" FROM OILM WHERE TransType in ('20', '67') AND ActionType in ('1', '19') AND LocCode = '01' GROUP BY ItemCode) T1 ON T0.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode AND T0.MessageID = T1.MaxMess INNER JOIN OBTL T2 ON T0.[MessageID] = T2.[MessageID] INNER JOIN OBIN T3 ON T2.[BinAbs] = T3.[AbsEntry] RIGHT JOIN PCH1 T4 ON T0.[ItemCode] = T4.[ItemCode] INNER JOIN OPCH T5 ON T4.[DocEntry] = T5.[DocEntry] WHERE T5.[DocNum] = [%0]

entry.title: Re: How to query for last Bin Location that received Items?
entry.content: This gets the last BIN location that received this item in warehouse 01

entry.title: Re: How to query for last Bin Location that received Items?
entry.content: Based on items from A/R reserved Invoice

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content:
The problem you are having is due to CR 2016 is a 32 bit application, it can't handle 64 bit integers. 15 digits plus one for the sign is all it can handle, always been that way, it's the nature of C++ Int's.

You could try CR 2020, it's 64 bit and see this KBA on how to create a C++ or COM UFL:

1603381 - How to create a C++ UFL using the new Unicode UFL interface in Crystal Reports 2008 & later

Other than that Ido's work around is one option, the other is to use a Stored Procedure to break the value into 2 parts and put them back together using a field object and drop the most significant+least significant field into the object so they appear as one value.

entry.title: Re: SAP BO 4.2 SP05: Windows Server OS Upgrade From 2008...
entry.content:
If we decide to build a new server and perform a fresh installation of the OS and BO 4.3 software, is it possible to migrate all content (including Webi Reports, Universes, Connections, Users, Permissions, Schedules, and Configurations) from BO 4.2 to 4.3? If so, could you please provide guidance on this process?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Create Alternate GL Hierarchies in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: Thank you for confirming. As for the BPC comment, I was admittedly not part of the admin side at my old company so I could be getting something wrong but we used to be able to ask for alternative hierarchy nodes that were similar to existing ones but would include or exclude certain items. The team would create this new node and we would see it within our account hierarchy. I suppose they had to be in separate total rollups with unique roots but they could be used within the same reporting assuming you used the correct ID.

entry.title: Re: How to determine the date a quote item was last modified?
entry.content: Ahh yes, good point. We're still in Quote 1.0.

entry.title: Re: Interesting Query - SQL Challenge !
entry.content:
select p~patientid, p~patientname

from YSAM_PAT_TESTS AS p

join ysam_sickness as s

on p~symptomid = s~symptomid

and sicknessid = '02'

GROUP BY patientid , patientname

having count(*) = ( SELECT count(*)

FROM YSAM_SICKNESS

WHERE sicknessid = '02' )

into table @DATA(wlt_pat).

entry.title: Re: Check interface method is implemented
entry.content:
I know this question is quite old, but I had to find a way to do this in ABAP for Cloud Development. 

cl_oo_classname_service is not released for use, so another approach was needed (calling the method with fake parameters is not an option).

The solution comes complements of the XCO classes. With these classes, you can read the source code of the method implementation into a string table. If the method is not implemented, an exception is raised. Here is an example:

 

TRY.
    xco_cp_abap_repository=>object->clas->for( '<name of class>' )->implementation->method('<name of interface>~<name of method')->content( )->get_source( ).

    " method is implemented

  CATCH cx_xco_runtime_exception.
    " method is not implemented
ENDTRY.

entry.title: How to apply AR to AP for the same client? Please advise.
Re: Tax Classification as Required field in BP (S4 HANA)
entry.content: Hi, how can I know what did you do to have mandatory this field?

entry.title: Import Collection - Transport queue
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

We have a 3SL but haven't deployed the production tenant yet and are still using the Starter System for demos.

We've started importing transports into our Test system. Since the Production system isn't provisioned yet, will the imported transports in Test system automatically show up in Production queue for import when it's provisioned or would we need to create a ticket to update the Production queue manually? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Import Collection - Transport queue
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

When you receive your Production System you will be able to Forward your Transport Requests from Quality to Production System and then you will be able to import them. 

To Forward the Transport Requests, you only need to select them and click on "Forward" button. Then, they will be moved to P-System.

 

For more information, please check the documentations below:

  • SAP Help Portal | 3-System Landscape and Transport Management
  • SAP Help Portal | Set Up SAP S/4HANA Cloud Production System in a 3-System Landscape

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: More Enhancements for SAP Community
entry.content: Good work

entry.title: Re: How to use CDS Access Control (Authorization Object Check in CDS Views)
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-data-models/cds-authorization-concept

CDS roles restrict the read access only for the CDS entity they reference, and there is no automatic inheritance. When a CDS entity is used as a data source in another CDS entity, the consuming CDS entity does not inherit any access controls from the underlying entity. ABAP SQL queries on the overlying entity have full access to the data, regardless of the access restrictions of the underlying entity. In other words, there is no automatic inheritance of CDS access controls to higher layers of a CDS data model. You must define access control for each individual entity that you want to protect.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Free Text Field/Dimension?
entry.content: Is it possible to create a dimension that acts as a free text field? For certain projects, payment from the customer are contingent on certain milestones being met but what those milestones are called changes from project to project depending on the nature of the project and the contract.  My solution now is to create a dimension called 'Milestone' that the teams can load data to and they will have to tell me what to add every time they start a new project but was hoping to find a more efficient solution where the teams can be more independent and not wait on me to fulfill the new milestone name request.

entry.title: Re: SAPB1 Single sign On SLD greyed out
entry.content: Obrigado!

entry.title: Elevate your business with the power of AI! (Webinar)
entry.content:
Are you ready to elevate your business with the power of AI?

The SAP Integration and Certification Center (ICC) is thrilled to invite our valued partners to our webinar that delves into the transformative potential of artificial intelligence. This webinar is designed to provide you with the knowledge and tools necessary to innovate and grow within the SAP ecosystem utilizing AI.

 

Agenda:

  1. Welcome and Kick-off

    • We’ll start with an introduction to the webinar, outlining the key topics and objectives of the session.

  2. AI Expert Session

    • Engage with industry-leading AI experts as they explore the latest trends, challenges, and opportunities in AI. Discover how you can leverage AI to create smarter, more efficient applications that drive real value for your customers.

  3. Certification for Partner Apps Using Generative AI Hub

    • Learn about SAP Generative AI and how your applications can achieve certification. This session will provide insights into the certification process, its benefits, and how it can help you stand out in a competitive market.

  4. Q&A

    • Have questions? We’ve got answers. Our experts will be available to address any queries you have about AI, certification, or how to maximize your partnership with SAP.

 

Why Attend?

  • Gain Expert Insights: Hear from AI specialists who will share their knowledge and experience in the field.
  • Understand Certification: Learn how to certify your AI-driven applications, giving you a competitive edge.
  • Get Your Questions Answered: Our Q&A session ensures you leave the webinar with all the information you need.

Register Now!

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving world of AI. Secure your spot today by [Registering Here].

We look forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: select from cust. table using SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to Us...
entry.content:
Hello Amgad-El-Stohi!

I recommend raising a case with the SAP CPQ support team to thoroughly investigate the issue you're encountering. At first glance, the tag seems to be correct, and there haven't been any documented changes to table tags in this release. However, the issue could potentially be related to the 2408 release.

To facilitate the investigation, please include all relevant details in your case submission, such as reproduction steps, proxy access to your tenant, and any other pertinent details.
Support team will be glad to help you!

entry.title: Re: Gross profit Base Price not showing
entry.content: Hello!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to Use " Table Tags " to get data i...
entry.content:
Hello Amgad-El-Stohi!

I recommend raising a case with the SAP CPQ support team to thoroughly investigate the issue you're encountering. At first glance, the tag seems to be correct, and there haven't been any documented changes to table tags in this release. However, the issue could potentially be related to the 2408 release.

To facilitate the investigation, please include all relevant details in your case submission, such as reproduction steps, proxy access to your tenant, and any other pertinent details.

If this is the exact same of select from cust. table using SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to... - SAP Community, only one case is needed to investigate.

Support team will be glad to help you!

entry.title: Re: Gross profit Base Price not showing
entry.content:
Hello!
To better address your issue, we recommend creating a support case for the SAP Support team. This will enable them to analyze your issue thoroughly and provide a more accurate solution.

1922545 - How to create the perfect support case for SAP Technical Support. LINK: https://me.sap.com/notes/192254

entry.title: Count function in webi
entry.content:
I'm having trouble with a seemingly simple formula in webi

I am trying to count the number of times a username appears in the list. When ther are multiple usernames in the username object, they will have a diffent position number. Below is a sample of the data:

UsernamePosition NumberCount 
JDOE12345 
JDOE54321 

I have tried the following formulas but keep getting a result of 1 when there are more than 1 
=count([Username])
=count([Username]) foreach ([Position Number])
=count([Username]) forall ([Position Number])
I have also tried reversing Username and Position Number as well adding the sum function in front. 

I'm hoping someone has some advice on what I am doing wrong or something else I could try. 

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content: Thank you for the answer. I understood the GROW Service Use Description.

entry.title: Re: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content: I got the answer for the second question. I will separately post the first question and close this Q&A.

entry.title: Reading of IP Address and check if it is whitelisted in the key value mapping in SAP APIM
entry.content:
Dear Team,
I have a requirement where i need to check the IP address is whitelisted or not using KeyValueMapping in SAP APIM.
My customer will trigger the request from their application. In my case i am using the postman. As a part of header i am able to see the IP Address which is getting stored in the header X-Forwarded for. Now i need to check if the IP Address is present in the key value map if it exists then i need to proceed with the next steps. Other wise it should throw the error as invalid IP. I have defined the value mapping as well with list of ip addresses. If I am using the parameter from postman then it is checking the key and accordingly it is giving the results. But my customer will not pass any parameter. So i need to store the IP address and check in the key value maps dynamically. Please help me on this with steps. 

Regards
Santosh

entry.title: Re: Highlights of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 Release
entry.content:
Hello,

First of all thanks for the detailed blog.

Another feature I have observed post the 2408 upgrade is that we are able to configure Additional ISO codes & Dimensions which earlier was 'Read Only' in public cloud. Below are the snapshots for reference. 

@BeSchulze

entry.title: How to expand default memory size for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hello ILM experts,

As described in the help portal page for ILM Advisor app, the default licensed memory size is 100 GB.
Does the default memory size of 100GB apply to all customer production systems?
How can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB if required?

Or how is the /messages[(message)] addressed?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services offered as Trial Version
entry.content:
I am working with BTP trial account and went through the CAP Java tutorial (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-cap-java-deploy-cf.html). I have it working and now want to figure out a way to access the API from postman. With the default IDP service (SAP ID Service), I am forced to do 2-Factor authentication and cannot test APIs from postman. So I am exploring creating an trial tenant of SAP Cloud Identity Services and use it. I created an user in the trial tenant.

Now I was hoping that without 2FA, I would be able to authenticate the new user and access the application API endpoint. But I get the below 'MAIL_NOT_VERIFIED' error even though I have verified the email. I can even login as that user in the UI and administer the tenant. The user profile also indicates that Email is verified. Any ideas why it is not working? Is this a restriction on trial account?

 

Thanks a lot in advance for any pointers!

ClientId, secret, xsuaa-authentication-endpoint are retrieved from the xsuaa service instance bound to my app. 

 

curl --location 'https://<xsuaa-authentication-endpoint>.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
--data-urlencode 'client_id=<clientId>' \
--data-urlencode 'client_secret=<secret>' \
--data-urlencode 'grant_type=password' \
--data-urlencode 'username=<email id of user created in custom tenant>' \
--data-urlencode 'password=<password>'
{
    "error": "invalid_client",
    "error_description": "{\"error\":\"invalid_grant\",\"error_description\":\"User authentication failed: MAIL_NOT_VERIFIED\"}"
}

 

Thanks

Prasanna

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content:
@patrick_winkler 

I've created an app as per your blog. However, we need to modify the table entries in production and hence I've commented out the lines where it requires transport selection. Tried this in a working client and all works well.

I've tested this in a client where the status has been set to non modifiable (as it would be in production) and i'm getting this error:

Tried the SOBJ route, but no dice. Can you kindly guide on how I can rectify this please?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: No PO without PR
entry.content:
Hi!

In S4 Hana Public Cloud, currently, there is no standard configuration (SSCUI) to be able to make a PR mandatory for PO (This is possible via configuration in On-premise). 

For your requirement of making PR mandatory for PO, you will have to do BADI extensions which has been described by Eric in the other answer above.

 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content: @smok1  what is your environment? I have no problem for btp abap system(production one)

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content: @junwu S4 hana cloud private cloud edition - it works only in open client, not closed client. I want to modify it directly in closed client (production) without a transport.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello David

I wanted to start by saying thank you for recently assisting my daughter Sakura (Cherry Blossom) with SAP information for women. We went through the links provided, unfortunately Sakura is a little too young (at present) and found the content difficult. Therefore, we will revisit this opportunity soon, after she graduates.

I however, was impressed by the SAP Initiative and wish to pursue (if possible) please

I identify as a person in the category:

    • Single parent 

I have successfully completed Project Management courses previously, but Im unfortunately unemployed at present and am hoping the SAP Activate certification, will kick start my future job opportunities.

I have identified this learning journey Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-activate-agile-project-delivery as I possible “best match”

Any assistance would be appreciated

Thank you in advance

Leon

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:

Data Preview of new created fields

entry.title: Re: We can't post goods issue with error.
entry.content:
Please check the delivery header text in your delivery document
Menu>Header Details>Texts tab

 

 

You might see text type "Dummy" .

 

 

 

Next , please check the configurations for "Text Determination" in your CBC.
SSCUI ID: 101291 Set Up Text Determination for Delivery Header
Choose Text Determination Procedure: "T6" and double click on "Text IDs in Procedure" in the tree structure on your left hand side.

 

 

 

Now you might see text type Dummy with "Text Is Mandatory". Change the Text Is Mandat. field into "Text Is Not Mandatory".

entry.title: Re: Implementation will not be called
entry.content: I have activated the implementation. However, when I check each time it is still inactivate. What is the reason?

entry.title: Re: Assignment field in Group Reporting
entry.content: You could aggregate against AssignmentReference (ZUONR) via SPRO-> GR -> MasterData -> Define Consolidation Master Data Field -> Aggregate data on release.

entry.title: Re: RFC Destination FIORI-PLP_HTTPS, BWP is much slower t...
entry.content: After restarting the application server, the testing speed of RFC "FIORI_FLP_HTTPS" increased, but a few days later it slowed down again. Can you help me analyze the cause and how to troubleshoot.

entry.title: Re: How to determine the date a quote item was last modif...
entry.content:
Hi,

For Quote 1.0, the best approach seems to be using an item custom field to log the last modified date. Alternatively, you could use a product attribute to capture the item's last configuration change date. The recommended triggers to update this information are OnItemAdded and OnItemUpdated.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Third party Service Delivery
entry.content: Added Sales tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Loading inception-to-date balances
entry.content: Hi Morten, just one question here, you don't need to reverse the YTD amount of each period, not limited to period 000 to the next period?

entry.title: How can I get PR number in ME52N?
entry.content:
I have an enhancement in ME52N to add a header tab. However, I use below coding to get PR number but failed.

      DATA:  ls_mereqheader TYPE REF TO cl_po_header_handle_mm.
      DATA: lt_header TYPE mepoheader.

      CREATE OBJECT ls_mereqheader.

      CALL METHOD ls_mereqheader->get_data
        IMPORTING
          ex_data = lt_header.

OR

      DATA: dynpfields TYPE TABLE OF dynpread.
      CALL FUNCTION 'DYNP_VALUES_READ'
        EXPORTING
          dyname               = 'SAPLMEGUI' "sy-repid
          dynumb               = '3327'   "sy-dynnr
*         TRANSLATE_TO_UPPER   = ' '
*         REQUEST              = ' '
*         PERFORM_CONVERSION_EXITS             = ' '
*         PERFORM_INPUT_CONVERSION             = ' '
*         DETERMINE_LOOP_INDEX = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_CURRENT_SCREEN       = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_MAIN_SCREEN          = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_STACKED_SCREEN       = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_ON_SCR_STACKPOS         = ' '
*         SEARCH_OWN_SUBSCREENS_FIRST          = ' '
*         SEARCHPATH_OF_SUBSCREEN_AREAS        = ' '
        TABLES
          dynpfields           = dynpfields
        EXCEPTIONS
          invalid_abapworkarea = 1
          invalid_dynprofield  = 2
          invalid_dynproname   = 3
          invalid_dynpronummer = 4
          invalid_request      = 5
          no_fielddescription  = 6
          invalid_parameter    = 7
          undefind_error       = 8
          double_conversion    = 9
          stepl_not_found      = 10
          OTHERS               = 11.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
      ENDIF.

What is wrong for the above coding? or any other way to get the PR number? Thanks in advance.
